title: Redis Stream Info
description: Schema for Redis XINFO STREAM response, providing detailed stream metadata.

length.description: Number of entries in the stream

radix-tree-keys.description: Number of keys in the underlying radix tree

radix-tree-nodes.description: Number of nodes in the underlying radix tree

last-generated-id.description: The last generated ID (may not be the last entry ID if entries were deleted)

max-deleted-entry-id.description: The maximum entry ID that was deleted from the stream

entries-added.description: Total number of entries added to the stream over its lifetime

recorded-first-entry-id.description: The ID of the first entry in the stream

groups.description: Number of consumer groups associated with the stream

first-entry.description: The first entry in the stream

last-entry.description: The last entry in the stream
